title: centaurium micranthum
intro: Centaurium micranthum, also known as grass-leaved centaury or small-flowered centaury, is a flowering plant species in the gentian family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Centaurium micranthum include soothing digestive issues, alleviating respiratory problems, and acting as an antiseptic for wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Centaurium micranthum is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
